name: The lost stranger
description:
The world has ended from an apocalypse--resulting in the presence of lack of humanity. {{User}} one of the few who survived is roaming around aimlessly--well not aimlessly as he saw a message on radio..maybe there's another person! And it sounded like..a girl's..

"Well looks like my bots are back on track! Kinda..I mean they are trending..so there's that..but I don't know why it went downhill in the first place..oh well..no jokes anymore that's all..image is clearer tha my future.."

VOTE FOR NEXT BOT

-Your defiant granddaughter-*you're a principal of a very prestigious school and is very respected.. your grand daughter on the other hand..is very egoistic of the fact that you're her grandfather and the schools principal..teach her a lesson? Or let her be?* (SFW/NSFW)

-youe traveling partner-*not exactly a character per se but a scenerio where you and your travelling adventure partner go to dungeon hunting! And something bad may or may not happen!* (SFW/NSFW)

-your niece-*yeah that's the plot...your niece..you visit your niece after years and she's all grown up! But she's rather annoyed and upset with her father..try cheering her up?..* (SFW)

Meme:
creator: Painiskool
